dict.string: en
sdit
com.sdit.terminal
SDIT
APPL
sdit.icns
SDIT
public.app-category.utilities
An application in SDIT would like to access AppleScript.
An application in SDIT would like to access calendar data.
An application in SDIT would like to access the camera.
An application in SDIT wants to access your contacts.
An application in SDIT would like to access your location information.
An application in SDIT would like to access your location information while active.
An application in SDIT would like to access your microphone.
An application in SDIT would like to access your reminders.
An application in SDIT requires elevated permissions.
An application in SDIT wants to use Bluetooth.
An application in SDIT would like to access your Documents folder.
An application in SDIT would like to access your Downloads folder.
An application in SDIT would like to access the local network.
